description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) controller, featuring a rectangular, compact body with a predominantly gray and black color scheme. The front face displays a black panel with a cross-shaped D-pad on the left, two round red buttons labeled 'A' and 'B' on the right, and rectangular 'Select' and 'Start' buttons in the center. The word 'Nintendo' is printed in red on the right side of the controller. The sides and back are metallic gray, with a visible connector port for attaching to a console. The controller is made primarily of plastic with some internal metal components and wiring. Its design is iconic, evoking retro gaming culture and is easily recognizable by its color scheme and button layout.
description: A rectangular, gray and black Nintendo NES controller with a D-pad, two red buttons, and 'Select' and 'Start' buttons on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the D-pad, 'Select' and 'Start' buttons, and the two red 'A' and 'B' buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the arrangement of the buttons from a left angle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the controller and the connector port, with the D-pad and buttons less visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the D-pad in the foreground and the red buttons in the background.
